title: Maine Republican Senator Susan Collins Breaks GOP Ranks to Restrict Trump's Iran War Powers
summary: Senator Susan Collins voted with Democrats to advance a resolution limiting President Trump's war powers in Iran without Congressional authorization. The move aims to prevent unilateral US military involvement. This bipartisan effort underscores internal GOP divisions on the conflict.
contents:
# Maine Republican Senator Susan Collins Breaks GOP Ranks to Restrict Trump's Iran War Powers

## Event Overview

Senator Susan Collins voted with Democrats to advance a resolution limiting President Trump's war powers in Iran without Congressional authorization. The move aims to prevent unilateral US military involvement. This bipartisan effort underscores internal GOP divisions on the conflict.

## Context and Reporting

Reporting attached to OSINT source profile @NationalInterest (twitter-national-interest) highlights this development within the past hour. The reporting window covers 2026-04-30T20:27Z through 2026-04-30T21:27Z. Topical scope encompasses Iran war, war powers, Susan Collins, Congress, Trump. Geographic focus centers on Washington, DC.
